## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Testing

- [ ] `swift build`
- [ ] `swift test`
- [ ] `scripts/build_app.sh`, if app bundle metadata, packaging, or release behavior changed
- [ ] Manual app check, if relevant

## Privacy and Security

- [ ] This does not add tracking, cloud sync, analytics, telemetry, or hidden data collection
- [ ] This does not add new sensitive permissions
- [ ] Any permission-sensitive behavior is documented

## Release Impact

- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` is updated, or this change does not need a changelog entry
- [ ] Release docs/checklists are updated, or this change does not affect release behavior
